objective: Prove direct RTL equivalence for 1/2/4/8 query-head lanes and record explicit replay and cycle costs.

decoder_contract.decode_score_multivalue_gqa_folded_lane_: Directly simulate 1/2/4/8 physical query-head lanes, checking intermediate score writes and reads plus all 128 ordered outputs. Charge one complete packed Q/K replay and one shared value pass per wave; do not assume hidden query or key buffering.

evaluation_record.title: GQA8 shared-K/V multivalue decode group for the Llama7B frontier
evaluation_record.primary_question: How do area, timing, and KV service demand change when one complete Llama7B GQA8 group is embodied instead of pricing eight query heads as independent value consumers?
evaluation_record.expected_reason: Folded PPA requires direct score/output equivalence with explicit Q/K and value replay.
